title: Glider (disambiguation)
content:
The term '''glider''' may refer to:

==Characters==
*'''[[Glider (clone trooper)|Glider]]''', a [[clone trooper]]

==Creatures==
*'''[[Baspoor glider]]''', an omnivorous flying amphibian
*'''[[Glider (creature)]]''', flying creatures found on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*'''[[Glider (lizard)]]''', flying creatures found on [[Orellon II]]
*'''[[Jedha Glider]]''', flying reptiles found on [[Jedha]]
*'''[[Water glider]]''', a red arthropod found on [[Marca/Legends|Marca]]
*'''[[Relter]]s''', known as '''gliders''' while in development

==Vehicles==
*'''[[Commander's glider]]''', a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] carried aboard [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]
*'''[[Glider (vehicle)/Legends|Glider (vehicle)]]''', hang-gliders used on [[Lahsbane/Legends|Lahsbane]]
*'''[[Glider-sail]]''', equipment used for parachuting pr wind-sailing
*'''[[Gossamer glider]]''', an escape vehicle used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]
*'''[[Loth-bat glider]]''', a glider created by the [[Spectres]] that resembled [[Loth-bat]]s.
*'''[[Para-wing glider]]''', a light, single person vehicle
*'''[[Pteron glider]]''', an atmospheric fighter used on [[Tython/Legends|Tython]]
*'''[[Hang glider]]''', a vehicle used by [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]
*'''[[Zarrak's hang glider]]''', a [[hang glider]] used by the Ewok [[Zarrak]]

==Unidentified==
*'''[[Unidentified Ewok (hang glider) 1]]''', a glider using Ewok
{{Disambig}}
